description_long: This object is a cylindrical plastic bottle with a gray ribbed screw cap, commonly used for dietary supplements or over-the-counter medicines. The bottle is wrapped in a blue label that covers most of its surface, featuring white and light blue text. The front of the label prominently displays the product name 'hella healthy immune support' along with key ingredients such as vitamin C, elderberry, and zinc. Supplement facts and additional product information are printed on the back and sides of the label in smaller text. The bottle appears to be lightweight and portable, suitable for carrying in a bag or placing on a shelf. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on health and wellness branding.
description: A small, cylindrical plastic bottle with a gray screw cap and a blue label for 'immune support' supplements. The label features white text and detailed product information.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen at an angle, showing the side of the blue label with partial supplement facts and a glimpse of the front branding.
description_view_1: The front of the bottle is visible, clearly displaying the 'hella healthy immune support' branding and main product details.
description_view_2: This view shows the opposite side of the bottle, with the label text partially visible and the cap's ribbed texture apparent.
description_view_3: The back of the bottle is shown, featuring the full 'Supplement Facts' panel and additional product information.
attribute_label_text: hella healthy HH immune support vitamin c | elderberry | zinc 60 count | dietary supplement Supplement Facts Serving Size: 1 Gummy [illegible]
